purpose: Verify the routing table in SKILL.md causes each test prompt to load the expected reference file, and that the universal-checks tier fires on ambient prompts.

evals.name: useeffect-derived-state
memo-chain-broken
modal-behind-navbar
evals.prompt: My modal dialog appears BEHIND the sticky navbar even though I set z-index: 99999 on the modal. The navbar's parent container has `transform: translateY(0)` for a slide-in animation. How do I fix this?

evals.name: rendering-model-choice
evals.prompt: We're building an internal admin dashboard for ~500 enterprise users (no public SEO, auth-gated, heavy data tables and forms). Should we use Next.js App Router with RSC, or just Vite SPA with React Router? Most users are on slow corporate VPNs.

evals.name: bundle-size-investigation
evals.prompt: Our Next.js app's initial JS is 1.2MB. Lighthouse LCP on mobile is 4.8s. The bundle analyzer shows our main chunk is 800kb. We're using shadcn/ui, date-fns, recharts, and tRPC. How do I figure out what to trim first?

evals.name: ambient-review
evals.expected_reference: may also load useeffect-antipatterns.md for the fetch pattern
